## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What broke? -->

## Reproduction

<!-- Smallest set of steps, code, or commands to trigger it.
     Include `zig build` invocations, peer client/server, RFC scenario,
     or the QNS test letter (H, D, C, S, R, Z, M) if interop-related. -->

## Expected behavior

<!-- What you expected nullq to do, and the RFC reference if relevant. -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What nullq actually did. Logs, qlog excerpts, or panic traces
     are very helpful. -->

- Zig version (`zig version`):
- OS / arch:
